category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/xing5/mcp-google-sheets describes a Python MCP server bridging MCP clients and Google Sheets API.
source_facts.description says the MCP server integrates with Google Drive and Google Sheets.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use mcp-google-sheets: https://github.com/xing5/mcp-google-sheets
docs_sources: No dedicated official docs site found; official GitHub README is the project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes spreadsheet automation through Google Sheets API.
source_facts.description names Google Drive and Google Sheets integration.
